channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 31st March
item.description:
Email received 30/03/2026 - copy attached along with photos. Customer reports that a tree at the location is leaning more and more each week. Crown of the tree has dropped 2-3 foot due to the lean and you can see cracking on the trunk. Concerned it is going to collapse.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 31st March
item.description:
Loose and rocking slab Please lift and relay 450x220x20mm Stats Standard TM with temp FW closure (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
15db Pothole CW. On crossing point 300x300x50mm Road closure with 15db (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 31st March
item.description:
tree dropping large branches onto pavement and property
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 31st March
item.description:
CW: Rutting and Depression 1200mmx310mmx53mm TM: STOP and GO Near lamp post No 35 (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken kerb, a danger to pedestrians, 31st March
item.description:
At the corner of st Phillips street the curb is badly damaged and dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Norwood Road, Tivoli, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes along previous roadworks, 31st March
item.description:
As you drive up Norwood road and enter the junction of Suffolk street the surface is awful, its now a line of potholes due to the poor work on a previous trench in the road. I cycle this route daily and it's dangerous. this is a higlhy used piece of road and its getting worse by the week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Norwood Road, Tivoli, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped fridge freezer, 31st March
item.description:
Flytipped overnight on 30-31 March 2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Shakespeare Road, St Mark's, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes, 31st March
item.description:
Along this stretch there are multiple potholes, some worse than others. some have been repaired badly. there is an area of 3 or 4 square metres that is a patch work of uneven surfaces and potholes. it needs resurfacing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32;34, Grafton Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A long stretch of pothole due to poor maintenance, 31st March
item.description:
Outside the coop on the bath road there has previously been a trench dug and along the length of it the surface has gone resulting in a terrible surface that is dangerous to cyclists

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 192A,192B, 192C, 192D, Bath Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
CW: Pothole 1200mmx900mmx42mm TM: STOP and GO Opposite Lamp post No DP44 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on the small lane just of kidnappers, 31st March
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 31st March
item.description:
Broken raised slab. Please lift and replace 900x600x20mm Stats Standard TM with temp FW closure (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 31st March
item.description:
Loose and rocking concrete Concrete between slabs is loose and rocking. Please replace with new concrete 300x50x20mm Stats Standard TM with temp FW closure (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
Pothole FW Missing blocks causing Pothole 300x100x100mm Stats Standard TM with temp FW closure Previously made safe at time of inspection but no perm job in (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 31st March
item.description:
Damaged kerb Please repair with concrete 100x100x40mm Standard TM with temp FW closure (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 31st March
item.description:
Abrupt level difference on kerb stones in FW Please lift and relay x 2 kerbstones Stats Standard TM with temp FW closure (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 31st March
item.description:
Abrupt level difference on kerb stones in FW Please lift and relay x 2 kerbstones Stats Standard TM with temp FW closure (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 31st March
item.description:
Loose noisy cover Please lift and investigate 4 way stop and go (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
CW: Pothole (Patch Required) 1400mmx700mmx54mm TM: STOP and GO 1 x NSD Opposite Holmedale B&B (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
